title: Badge: Smart Spender Kid
resultGreatDescription: You made {{score}} smart spending decisions out of {{total}} challenges!
skillsDescription: You learned to plan purchases, compare prices, and avoid impulse buying!
wisdomDescription: These habits will help you make smart financial decisions!
resultKeepDescription: You made {{score}} smart spending decisions out of {{total}} challenges.
resultKeepTip: Remember, smart spending means planning purchases, comparing prices, and avoiding impulse buys!

challenges.title: Birthday Money
challenges.question: You received Rs 500 as a birthday gift. What do you do?

feedback.correct: Excellent! Saving most of your money while spending some wisely is a smart approach!
feedback.wrong: Remember to save most of your money for future needs while spending some wisely!

challenges.title: Sale Offer
challenges.question: Your favorite toy is on 50% off, but you already have similar toys. Do you buy it?

feedback.correct: Perfect! Just because something is on sale doesn't mean you should buy it if you don't need it!
feedback.wrong: Only buy things you actually need, even if they're on sale!

challenges.title: Shopping List
challenges.question: You're going to the market with Rs 300. What's the smart approach?

feedback.correct: Amazing! Planning your purchases helps you spend wisely and avoid impulse buying!
feedback.wrong: Planning your purchases before shopping helps you spend wisely and stick to your budget!

challenges.title: Comparing Prices
challenges.question: The same notebook is Rs 50 at one store and Rs 40 at another. Which do you choose?

feedback.correct: Great! Comparing prices helps you save money on the same item!
feedback.wrong: Always compare prices to get the best value for your money!

challenges.title: Impulse Purchase
challenges.question: You planned to buy fruits for Rs 100 but see candy on the way. What do you do?

options.text: Forget the plan, buy what looks good

feedback.correct: Wonderful! Sticking to your plan helps you spend wisely and avoid unnecessary purchases!
feedback.wrong: Sticking to your shopping plan helps you spend wisely and avoid impulse purchases!
